description_long: This object is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, tapering blade that appears to be made of a reddish metallic material, giving it a striking and somewhat ornamental appearance. The blade is symmetrical and gradually narrows to a sharp point, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The crossguard is simple and black, extending horizontally to protect the wielder's hand, while the handle is cylindrical, black, and ends in a rounded pommel. The handle appears to be made of a different, likely more textured material for grip, possibly wrapped or coated. The overall design is reminiscent of a European longsword, with a modern or fantasy-inspired color palette. There are no visible engravings, jewels, or decorative patterns on the blade, guard, or handle.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a reddish blade, black crossguard, and cylindrical black handle, featuring a sleek and modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the reddish blade, black crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle.
